todos.title: Add scheduled tasks
todos.description: Create PowerShell scripts to register Windows Scheduled Tasks that run daily collection and weekly optimization. Files: scripts/automation/register_scheduled_tasks.ps1, scripts/automation/run_daily_job.ps1. Ensure tasks log output to data/logs/ and handle failures.

todos.title: Add GitHub Actions workflow
todos.description: Add a workflow `.github/workflows/auto-optimize.yml` to run the optimizer weekly and upload optimization results as artifacts. Use secrets for any API keys; workflow must be no-op if historical data missing.

todos.title: Add unit tests
todos.description: Add tests for `scripts/optimize_accuracy.py` and `scripts/collect_historical_results.py` under `tests/` and update CI to run them. Use small sample data in `tests/data/` for reliability.

todos.title: Add safe commit script
todos.description: Create `scripts/commit_optimization_results.ps1` to create a branch, add optimization results, commit, and push only if remote exists. Do not push by default; allow an env var `AUTO_PUSH=true` to enable pushing.

todos.title: Documentation & README updates
todos.description: Update `README.md` and add `docs/automation.md` describing scheduled tasks, workflows, and how to enable GitHub Actions securely using `scripts/setup_github_with_gh.ps1`.

todos.title: Run full test suite and lint
todos.description: Execute pytest and linter (ruff/mypy if configured), fix any issues discovered.
todos.notes: All tests pass (no failures, 4 expected skips). Ran ruff auto-fix: 149 unused imports removed (F401). Fixed test mocks to use correct import paths after auto-fix.

todos.title: Real-time lineup confirmation integration
todos.description: Integrate confirmed starting XI data 1 hour before match and trigger re-prediction when lineups are confirmed. Add connectors to SofaScore/FotMob and implement re-run hooks.

todos.title: Player-level impact scoring
todos.description: Implement player importance weights based on goals, assists, xG, defensive contributions; add `app/models/player_impact.py` and integrate with `enhanced_predictor.py`.

todos.title: Referee tendency database
todos.description: Scrape referee historical data, build tendency profiles (cards, penalties, home favoritism), apply adjustments to predictions.

todos.title: Travel fatigue modeling
todos.description: Track fixture congestion and rest days; apply fatigue penalties when teams play in quick turnarounds (e.g., Thursdayâ†’Sunday).

todos.title: Historical data depth expansion
todos.description: Backfill 3-5 seasons of historical data for seasonal trend detection and long-term modeling; store as `data/historical/` snapshots.

todos.title: Ensemble model with disagreement detection
todos.description: Measure agreement between ELO, Poisson, and ML models and lower confidence when models diverge; flag matches as 'uncertain'.

todos.title: Match context classification
todos.description: Classify match context (title race, relegation, derby) and apply motivation multipliers to predictions.

todos.title: Score prediction vs outcome prediction separation
todos.description: Build a two-stage model: outcome classifier then conditional score predictor; use Bayesian updating to combine.

todos.title: Dynamic ELO with recency weighting
todos.description: Implement time-decayed ELO where recent matches have higher weight and tune decay via backtesting.

todos.title: Upset detection model
todos.description: Train a classifier to detect upset conditions (cups, derbies, manager bounce) and increase underdog probability when detected.

todos.title: First goal importance modeling
todos.description: Model first-goal probability separately and chain conditional outcome probabilities based on first-goal likelihood.

todos.title: Expected goals (xG) integration
todos.description: Integrate xG from FBref/Understat and use xG for form calculations and xG differential features.

todos.title: Shot quality metrics
todos.description: Add shot quality and big-chances metrics as features for forward-looking performance modeling.

todos.title: Defensive solidity metrics
todos.description: Add defensive stats (clean sheets, interceptions) and encode defensive ratings for goals-against predictions.

todos.title: Manager tactical style encoding
todos.description: Build manager profiles (possession, pressing) and encode tactical style as features for matchup effects.

todos.title: Venue-specific performance
todos.description: Track team performance at specific stadiums, apply venue adjustments where appropriate.

todos.title: Time-of-day and day-of-week effects
todos.description: Analyze historical performance by kickoff time and encode as categorical features.

todos.title: Isotonic regression calibration
todos.description: Apply isotonic regression to calibrate confidence scores against historical accuracy using tracked predictions.

todos.title: Prediction tracking and feedback loop
todos.description: Store predictions and results in a DB, auto-fetch results, calculate accuracy by league/team/confidence and feed back to model improvements.

todos.title: Confidence interval bounds
todos.description: Provide prediction intervals (e.g., 70% home win [60-80%]) via bootstrapping and report uncertainty bands.

todos.title: League-specific calibration
todos.description: Calibrate confidence separately per league based on historical accuracy.

todos.title: Avoid overconfidence on favorites
todos.description: Apply soft caps on extreme probabilities and adjust upset likelihoods based on backtesting evidence.

todos.title: Pre-match odds movement tracking
todos.description: Poll odds APIs hourly pre-match to detect sharp movements and adjust predictions when significant shifts occur.

todos.title: Social media sentiment analysis
todos.description: Monitor Twitter/X for injury rumors and team sentiment that may affect last-minute changes.

todos.title: Weather impact refinement
todos.description: Refine weather models by team style (passing teams vs direct teams) for conditional penalties.

todos.title: Historical backtesting framework
todos.description: Implement time-series cross-validation backtesting (rolling windows), track accuracy and Brier scores. This is in-progress and prioritized.
todos.notes: BacktestingFramework implemented with rolling-window cross-validation. CLI runner scripts/run_backtest.py added. Wired into auto-optimize.yml workflow.

todos.title: A/B testing infrastructure
todos.description: Run parallel predictions of control vs treatment and compare accuracy with statistical testing (z-tests). Implement recording and evaluation flows.

todos.title: Brier score optimization
todos.description: Optimize model parameters to minimize Brier score in addition to accuracy metrics.

todos.title: Edge case documentation
todos.description: Flag high-confidence misses and document root causes (lineups, referee, red cards) for manual review and model improvements.

todos.title: Graceful degradation on data gaps
todos.description: Implement tiered fallbacks and confidence penalties for missing data sources to prevent crashes and poor predictions.

todos.title: Anomaly detection on inputs
todos.description: Detect impossible statistics and anomalous inputs; build a human review queue for flagged matches.

todos.title: Model staleness detection
todos.description: Alert on declines in rolling accuracy and trigger retraining when drift is detected.

todos.title: Multi-match accumulators
todos.description: Calculate joint probabilities for accumulators and model correlations between matches.

todos.title: Goal timing predictions
todos.description: Predict goal timing distributions (first half vs second half) for in-play strategies.

todos.title: Cards and corners predictions
todos.description: Add models for yellow cards, red cards and corners based on team style and referee tendencies.

todos.title: Both teams to score (BTTS) prediction
todos.description: Create a dedicated BTTS model to improve binary outcome accuracy for this market.

todos.title: Over/under goals at multiple lines
todos.description: Add O/U probability outputs for common lines (1.5, 2.5, 3.5, 4.5) using Poisson or simulated distributions.

todos.title: Publication gate & thresholds
todos.description: Enforce publication thresholds (min confidence, min data_quality_score) from `config/settings.yaml`; redirect failing reports to `reports/simulated/` and add tests to prevent regressions.

todos.title: Historical backfill & re-run optimizer
todos.description: Backfill missing historical match results (use `scripts/collect_historical_results.py` and fallback connectors), then re-run optimization sweeps and save artifacts under `data/optimization_results/`.

todos.title: CI: synthetic detection & Windows runner
todos.description: Add a CI job to run the synthetic detection test and include a Windows runner to catch encoding/encoding-like issues and ensure the publish gate behaves correctly on Windows.
todos.notes: Windows CI now honors RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS env var; integration tests skip unless explicitly enabled.

todos.title: Audit script for simulated reports
todos.description: Add `scripts/audit_synthetic_reports.py` to list `reports/simulated/` contents, flag items older than N days, and optionally open an issue or email maintainers.

todos.title: Integrate PredictionTracker into production
todos.description: Wire `app/models/prediction_tracker.py` into `enhanced_predictor.py` and report generation to ensure every prediction is recorded and updated when results arrive.
todos.notes: Tracker wired in enhanced_predictor.py and SingleMatchGenerator. Result-fetch script scripts/update_prediction_results.py added and hooked into fetch-results.yml daily workflow. Fixed InjuriesConnector skip_injuries guard post-PR#1 merge (SKIP_INJURIES env var).

todos.title: Monitoring: synthetic rate alert
todos.description: Add monitoring to track the fraction of synthetic reports and alert via webhook if synthetic rate exceeds a threshold (e.g., 10% over 7 days).

todos.title: FlashScore debug mode & decompression heuristics
todos.description: Add `--debug` support to backfill, save raw FlashScore responses under `reports/debug/flashscore/`, add decompression heuristics (brotli/zlib) and retries; add tests and a diagnostic inspector script.

todos.title: Refine FlashScore parsing from debug files
todos.description: Analyze debug sample files and implement robust extraction for observed payload types (script payload vs decompressed JSON vs consent pages). Add tests and CI checks.

todos.title: Prepare PR & release notes
todos.description: Push `feature/flashscore-debug`, open a PR with summary, add release notes and CI notes. If origin isn't configured, provide instructions to maintainer. Ensure branch name and commit message are clear.
todos.notes: PR #1 (InjuriesConnector) merged into main via squash merge on 2026-01-22.

todos.title: Injury feed connector
todos.description: Implement `app/data/connectors/injuries.py` to fetch and normalize injury data from API-Football (primary) with fallbacks to official club feeds and scrapers (SofaScore/FlashScore). Include caching, backoff, and normalization for the DataQualityEnhancer.
todos.notes: Implemented connector, parsers, fixtures, and tests; added fallback parsing and 429 handling; PR #1 created.

todos.title: Team news & lineup scrapers
todos.description: Create scrapers/connectors for team news and confirmed lineups (official club sites, X/Twitter, SofaScore/FotMob) and add a pre-match recheck hook to trigger re-prediction when lineups are confirmed.

todos.title: Betting odds connectors & pre-match polling
todos.description: Implement/extend `market_data_connectors.py` to integrate ODDS_API_KEY and other market providers, add hourly pre-match polling, detect sharp movements, and surface changes to the prediction engine.

todos.title: Social rumor monitoring (expand)
todos.description: Expand social media monitoring to include pre-match injury rumors and verified team announcements; add a lightweight rumor scoring system and source provenance for manual review.

todos.title: Rate-limit, caching & resilience improvements
todos.description: Add centralized request throttling (respect provider rate-limits), exponential backoff, persistent caching of responses under `data/cache/`, and alerting for repeated 429s. Add tests that simulate 429/500 failures and verify fallbacks.
todos.notes: Added persistent disable flag on 429, token bucket throttling, and tests simulating 429s.

todos.title: Connector tests & CI integration
todos.description: Add unit and integration tests for new connectors and update CI to run integration tests conditionally (only when secrets are available). Add canary/monitoring jobs to detect API changes/failures.
todos.notes: Unit and integration tests added; integration suite now gates via RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS env flag (spread to Windows CI). Added `.github/workflows/integration-tests-on-label.yml` to run integration tests when a PR receives the `run-integration` label or via manual dispatch (requires `API_FOOTBALL_KEY` in repo secrets).

todos.title: Prioritize, schedule & assign
todos.description: Group the new data/connectors tasks into a prioritized roadmap, estimate effort, and create issues/PR templates to start implementation and reviews.

todos.title: Model explainability & SHAP reports
todos.description: Generate per-prediction explainability using SHAP, add aggregate feature importance reports, and include interpretability sections in markdown outputs for human review.

todos.title: Model registry & artifact versioning
todos.description: Add a simple model registry to track model artifacts, metadata (git commit, training data snapshot, metrics) and enable rollback. Persist artifacts under `models/` with manifest files.

todos.title: Feature store & feature versioning
todos.description: Create a lightweight feature registry / store (under `data/features/`) to record feature generation code, versions, and data lineage for reproducibility.

todos.title: Programmatic prediction API + auth
todos.description: Add a small REST API to serve predictions programmatically with authentication (token-based) and rate-limiting; include an example client and Docs.

todos.title: Secret scanning & CI policies
todos.description: Add detect-secrets/pre-commit hook and a GitHub Actions job to scan for secrets; add docs on key rotation and emergency revocation procedures.

todos.title: Provider SLA & usage monitoring
todos.description: Track API usage & costs for paid providers, set thresholds/alerts for over-usage, and add a strategy for failover or request throttling when budgets or rate limits are reached.

todos.title: Data retention & backup policy
todos.description: Define retention policies for reports, caches, and snapshots; add automated backup scripts and an archival strategy for long-term storage.

todos.title: End-to-end smoke tests & CI canary
todos.description: Add a small E2E smoke test that runs a minimal report generation using recorded fixtures or secrets-managed credentials; add a canary job to CI to catch breakages early.

todos.title: Onboarding docs & ops runbooks
todos.description: Add `docs/onboarding.md` and `docs/ops_runbook.md` with instructions for setting up local dev, secrets, rotating keys, and responding to incidents (e.g., API outages, high synthetic rate).

todos.title: Draft PR: Injuries connector
todos.description: Create a draft PR for `feature/injuries-connector`, attach robots report, add compliance notes and reviewer labels.
todos.notes: Compliance section appended to PR body; labels `legal-review` and `data-fetch` created and applied; awaiting reviewer assignments.

todos.title: Request reviewers for PR #1
todos.description: Request review from legal/compliance and data engineering owners for PR #1. Used CODEOWNERS to route the PR automatically.
todos.notes: Created CODEOWNERS with @Zed-777 so PR now receives reviews automatically when needed.

todos.title: Large file remediation (Git LFS)
todos.description: Investigate large files flagged during push and create a migration plan to Git LFS or remove history; document steps and create an issue/PR to perform migration.
todos.notes: Git push reported large file warnings; recommend `git lfs migrate import` or BFG to rewrite history. Issue created: https://github.com/Zed-777/sports-prediction-system/issues/8

todos.title: Auto-merge when legal + integration green
todos.description: Add a GitHub Actions workflow to auto-merge PRs when they have `run-integration` and `legal-approved` labels and all checks pass; requires careful label-controlled approvals.
todos.notes: Workflow merges PRs when the 'ready-to-merge' label is applied and required labels present with successful checks. Fixed 2026-03-02: replaced non-existent peter-evans/merge-pull-request@v3 action with actions/github-script@v7 calling the GitHub merge API directly.

todos.title: Bug fix: InjuriesConnector skip_injuries guard
todos.description: After PR #1 merged InjuriesConnector, the skip_injuries flag in DataQualityEnhancer did not guard the new InjuriesConnector path, causing tests to hang on FlashScore network calls. Added env var SKIP_INJURIES and early-return guard before InjuriesConnector call.
todos.notes: Test suite now runs clean: 152 passed, 11 skipped, 0 failures (4 new tests added for update_prediction_results and run_backtest scripts). Use SKIP_INJURIES=1 env var for CI and local test runs.

todos.title: PROF-001: Core profitability engine
todos.notes: EV/ROI/Kelly/drawdown/RoR/Sharpe/significance engine. LIVE_CRITERIA dict with 7 hard thresholds. score_live_readiness() returns 0-100 score.

todos.title: PROF-002: Market odds simulator + synthetic data
todos.notes: MarketSimulator converts true probs to bookmaker decimal odds with margin. SyntheticMatchGenerator creates realistic match datasets using decoupled model/market simulation at configurable accuracy (0.45-0.75 range tested).

todos.title: PROF-003: Qualifying parameter gate
todos.notes: Three profiles: conservative (edge>=8pp, conf>=0.68), standard (edge>=5pp, conf>=0.60), aggressive (edge>=3pp, conf>=0.52). 8 rejection codes. QualifyingGate.evaluate() returns GateDecision with Kelly stake pct.

todos.title: PROF-004: Live trading validation pipeline
todos.notes: walk_forward_split(), simulate_bets(), sensitivity_analysis(). LiveTradingValidator.run() produces full verdict + saves JSON+text report to reports/profitability/.

todos.title: PROF-005: Profitability CLI runner + unit tests
todos.notes: 44 unit tests covering all 4 profitability modules. CLI runner with --profile/--bookmaker/--n-synthetic/--model-acc args. Exit 0=LIVE-READY, 1=not ready, 2=error. Validation result: 100/100 score LIVE-READY at 60% accuracy (sharp bookmaker): ROI=+29.5%, hit_rate=59.7%, MaxDD=22.6%, RoR=0.00%, walk-forward positive in 100% of folds.

todos.title: HIST-001: Bulk historical data seeder
todos.notes: Fetches 2 seasons x 5 leagues (~2000 matches) from football-data.org. Calls EnhancedPredictor for each match. Resumable. Needs FOOTBALL_DATA_API_KEY (free).

todos.title: HIST-002: API key setup helper
todos.notes: Interactive PS1 script: walks through football-data.org free key, API-Football optional key, GitHub secrets, and triggers bulk historical fetch.

todos.title: HIST-003: Fix docs/automation.md lint errors
todos.notes: Fixed MD031 (blank lines around fences), MD032 (blank lines around lists), MD060 (table pipe spacing). All Problems tab errors cleared.
